name: American Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 hard boiled eggs, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta shells in a large pot of boiling water until tender.
2. In a large bowl, blend mayonnaise, Parmesan cheese, vinegar, oregano, thyme, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
3. Drain and rinse the cooked pasta shells, then add them to the mayo mixture. Mix well.
4. Add chopped eggs, mozzarella cheese, red bell pepper, and scallions. Mix just until combined.
5. Serve immediately or cover and chill for several hours or overnight to blend flavors.
